case_title: KAHN'S DEPARTMENT STORE VS KNOX BETTY J.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAHN'S DEPARTMENT STORE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNOX BETTY J. $83.75 PRINCIPAL, $29.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $113.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX BETTY J. HEARING SET FOR SEP-30-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: AUG-24-1992 AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX BETTY J.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF SEP-30-1992, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM SEP-30-1992 TO OCT-14-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05 AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX BETTY J.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-14-1992, NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX BETTY J.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $83.75 FILED BY KAHN'S DEPARTMENT STORE AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX BETTY J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX BETTY J.
